curation_notes: Primary vulnerability location derived from advisory description which explicitly names the verify function in JWS+Verify.swift (lines 34-37) where alg:none causes immediate return true. Secondary location in JWT+Verification.swift where the default validators array lacks an algorithm blacklist, allowing the none algorithm to pass through the JWT-level verification API. Patch adds a SigningAlgorithmBlackListValidator and throws an error for alg:none with non-empty signatures. 7 non-test source files changed (including error types, helper methods, and a doc fix), making this a noisy patch. Vulnerability class kept as crypto-weakness per CWE-327 (Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm) since the root cause is accepting the 'none' cryptographic algorithm.
